qa_pairs.question: Which community area is named Near North Side and located on the Central side?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
WHERE community_area.side = 'Central' AND community_area.community_area_name = 'Near North Side'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which community area entities with side equal to 'Central' and community area name equal to 'Near North Side'?
